The Complete AI Video Generator & Image Editor Platform
Generate, edit, upscale, animate, and work from templates: everything you'd usually split across several apps, plus face swap, lip sync, and talking photos built for real projects. One account instead of five subscriptions. Free daily credits; no credit card or download.
Face Swap
Replace faces in videos, photos, and GIFs with a single reference image. Realistic skin-tone matching, expression tracking, and multi-person support.
Image to Video
Animate any still image with AI. Upload a photo and add cinematic camera motion, ideal for product ads, social posts, and bringing artwork to life.
AI Image Editor
Edit photos with natural-language prompts. Remove objects, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, and apply creative effects, no Photoshop needed.
Talking Photo
Make any portrait talk. Upload a face and an audio clip, and the AI generates a video with synchronized lip movements and natural expressions.
Text to Video
Describe a scene and watch it come to life. Converts text prompts into high-quality video clips with customizable aspect ratios and visual styles.
Lip Sync
Sync any face to any audio in any language. Dub content without reshoots, localize videos in minutes, and create viral lip-sync clips.
AI Video Generator
Your hub for every AI video tool: text-to-video, image-to-video, face swap, animation, and more. One place to generate any type of video.
AI Image Generator
Generate original images from text across 400+ styles. Product shots, illustrations, anime, concept art, and social graphics in seconds.
AI Clothes Changer
Virtually try on outfits with AI. Upload a photo and swap clothing styles, great for e-commerce visualization and fashion content.
AI Image Upscaler
Sharpen blurry photos, increase resolution up to 4×, restore old pictures, and add realistic detail, all without losing quality.
AI Headshot Generator
Professional AI headshots from a single selfie. Studio-quality portraits for LinkedIn, team pages, and marketing materials.
AI GIF Generator
Create custom GIFs from text prompts or images. Perfect for memes, reactions, and social media. Generate and share in seconds.
Who Uses Magic Hour
Ship ads, social clips, and product visuals from one account. Skip the tab shuffle and paying for five separate AI subscriptions.
Content Creators
Create viral face swap videos, AI-generated clips for TikTok and YouTube Shorts, talking photo content, and custom GIFs. Professional-quality content, accessible to every creator.
Marketing Teams
Scale ad campaigns with image-to-video product demos, A/B test visual assets, and localize content across languages using lip sync and AI voice tools.
E-Commerce Brands
Generate product photography with the AI image generator, swap outfits with the AI clothes changer, and produce video ads, all without a photoshoot.
Agencies & Studios
Build interactive campaigns with face swap at live events, personalize content at scale with the API, and deliver social-ready AI video in minutes.
Developers
Integrate face swap, image editing, lip sync, and more into your app with Magic Hour's REST API and official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust.
Educators & Students
Create explainer videos with text-to-video, animate diagrams with image-to-video, and produce educational content without expensive production tools.
Why Teams Pick Magic Hour Over a Stack of AI Apps
Run face swap, lip sync, talking photos, and the rest of your creative stack in one bill, with rollover credits and pricing that doesn't waste what you don't use.
One Plan, Every Tool
Video, images, editing, and templates under one login and one bill, instead of paying for a separate app for each job.
From Idea to Final File
Generate, edit, upscale, add voice, and browse 10,000+ templates in one workflow, without exporting between five different products to finish one asset.
Face Swap, Lip Sync & Talking Photos
Polished results for real social and ad content, not a gimmick bolt-on. Try face swap, lip sync, and talking photos on the free tier.
Try Free: No Sign-Up Wall
Use daily credits before you create an account. Unusually generous free tier; paid plans stay strong value around $10–15/mo for serious volume.
Fair Credits, No Lock-In Waste
Credits roll over every month forever, return on errors and cancels, and you can cancel or downgrade anytime, with transparent pricing without use-it-or-lose-it traps. See plans.
Parallel Generations & Fast Iterations
Queue several renders at once without hidden concurrency limits, so you can try variations the way real production schedules demand.
Templates + One-Click Workflows
Click-to-create templates and chains that go from idea to polished asset without hopping between products.
Web, Mobile & API
Same capabilities in the browser, on the go, and in your product via our REST API and SDKs, documented and built to handle production traffic, not just demos.
Ships Weekly, Support That Replies
New models and features on a weekly cadence. Earn free credits when others use templates you publish. Y Combinator-backed, founder-led support that answers fast.
Frequently Asked Questions
What is Magic Hour?
Magic Hour is a free online AI video generator and AI image editor that helps creators, marketers, and developers produce professional-quality content in seconds. With 100+ AI-powered tools, including face swap, image-to-video, AI image editor, lip sync, and more. You can create studio-grade videos and images entirely in your browser.
Is Magic Hour free to use?
Yes. Magic Hour offers free daily credits that let you create AI videos and edit images at no cost. You can access popular tools like face swap, AI image editor, lip sync, talking photo, AI GIF generator, and AI image upscaler without a credit card. Paid plans are available for creators and teams who need higher volume or premium features.
How does the AI video generator work?
Magic Hour's AI video generator supports multiple workflows: type a text prompt to generate a video from scratch (text-to-video), upload a photo to animate it (image-to-video), restyle existing footage (video-to-video), or create stop-motion animations. Each tool runs entirely in your browser and most videos are ready within seconds.
Can I generate images with AI on Magic Hour?
Absolutely. Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts across a wide range of styles: photorealistic, illustration, anime, concept art, and more. You can also use the AI image editor to modify existing images using natural-language instructions.
How does the face swap video tool work?
Magic Hour's AI face swap lets you replace a face in any video with another face using just a single reference photo. The AI automatically handles alignment, skin tone matching, lighting, and expression tracking to produce realistic results. You can also swap faces in photos, GIFs, and multi-person group shots, all for free.
What AI tools does Magic Hour offer beyond video and image generation?
Beyond the AI video generator and AI image generator, Magic Hour includes: lip sync (sync any video with audio), talking photo (make still images speak), AI headshot generator, AI image upscaler, AI clothes changer, AI GIF generator, voice cloner, voice generator, and more: over 100 tools in total.
Does Magic Hour have an API for developers?
Yes. Magic Hour provides a REST API with official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust. You can programmatically generate videos, images, and audio, from face swaps and text-to-video to image upscaling and voice cloning. Usage-based pricing and a 99.9% uptime SLA make it production-ready at any scale.
Do I need to download any software to use Magic Hour?
No. Magic Hour runs entirely in your web browser. There is nothing to install or configure. Sign up, choose a tool, and start creating immediately. Your projects are saved in the cloud, so you can access them from any device.
What makes Magic Hour different from other AI video generators?
Magic Hour combines over 100 AI video, image, and audio tools in one unified platform. Most competitors offer only a handful. It's trusted by 3M+ creators and 2K+ teams, backed by Y Combinator, and used by businesses worldwide. With free daily credits, browser-based access, 10,000+ templates, and a production-ready API, Magic Hour is built for both casual creators and enterprise workflows.
Can I use Magic Hour for commercial projects?
Yes. Content you create with Magic Hour can be used in commercial projects, marketing campaigns, social media, advertisements, and more. Paid plans provide additional credits and premium features for professional and team use.
How does the AI image generator work?
Magic Hour's AI image generator creates original images from text prompts using state-of-the-art diffusion models. Describe what you want: a product photo, character illustration, social media graphic, or abstract artwork. The AI produces it in seconds. Choose from 400+ styles including photorealistic, anime, and concept art.
What is the best free AI photo editor online?
Magic Hour offers a free AI photo editor that lets you edit images using natural-language prompts instead of complex menus. Remove objects, swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, enhance skin detail, or add creative effects. It works on any device in your browser, requires no sign-up to try, and is trusted by 3M+ creators worldwide.
Can I create AI videos from text prompts on Magic Hour?
Yes. Magic Hour's text-to-video AI generator converts written scene descriptions into polished video clips. Type a prompt and the AI produces a video in seconds. Beyond text-to-video, Magic Hour also supports image-to-video, face swap video, lip sync, and 100+ other AI video tools, all free to try with daily credits.
Have more questions? Visit our full FAQ or contact support.

metadata.title: AI Video Generator, Image Generator & Editor - 100+ Free Online AI Tools | Magic Hour
metadata.description: 100+ AI tools for video and images in one place: face swap, lip sync, talking photos, templates, generation, and editing. Credits roll over; refunds on errors. Try free without sign-up. Web, mobile, and API. Trusted by 3M+ creators.

brand_data.what_they_do: Magic Hour is a free online AI video generator and AI image editor platform with 100+ tools for creating, editing, upscaling, animating, and generating videos, images, and audio in the browser. It also offers a REST API and SDKs for developers.

brand_data.pricing_summary: Free daily credits with no sign-up required to try; paid plans are described as roughly $10–15/month for serious volume. Credits roll over, returns are offered on errors and cancels, and pricing is usage-based for the API.
brand_data.target_customer: Creators, marketers, developers, e-commerce brands, agencies, studios, educators, and students.
brand_data.value_prop: A unified, browser-based platform with 100+ AI video, image, and audio tools in one place, reducing the need for multiple subscriptions and workflows.
